offline_message: You are offline. Some features may be limited.
unknown_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
onboarding_1_body: Point your camera at any medicine packaging and instantly identify what it is and what it does.
onboarding_2_body: No medical jargon. Get clear, simple explanations about dosage, warnings, and what the medicine is used for.
onboarding_3_body: Enter your symptoms and find out which medicines in your home — or in our database — can help.
onboarding_4_body: Have questions about a medicine? Ask our AI assistant for dosage guidance, interactions, and safety information.
allow_camera_desc: MediScan needs camera access to scan medicine packaging. Tap Allow on the next screen.
camera_permission_denied: Camera permission is required to scan medicines. Please enable it in Settings.
scan_tip: Hold steady and ensure the text is in focus
prescription_subtitle: Upload a handwritten prescription to extract medicines, get simple explanations, and set dosage reminders.
prescription_no_medicines_found: No clear medicine names found. Try a clearer photo or better lighting.
emergency_desc: If you experience severe side effects or suspect an overdose, call emergency services immediately.
scan_failed_desc: We could not read the medicine packaging clearly. Try again with better lighting, or enter the name manually.
no_history_desc: Your scanned medicines will appear here.
delete_all_confirm: This will permanently delete all your scan history. Are you sure?
delete_item_confirm: Remove this scan from your history?
chat_type_hint: Ask about dosage, interactions, or safety...
chat_offline_banner: AI is offline — showing template answers. Connect to the internet for full AI responses.
chat_proactive_briefing: I have your medicine information loaded. Here is a quick summary, and feel free to ask me anything about it.
chat_no_messages: Ask me anything about this medicine.
chat_gemini_error: AI could not respond. Showing a template answer instead.
chat_rate_limit_error: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before asking again.
sign_out_confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
auth_error: Sign in failed. Please check your credentials.
clear_local_cache_desc: Deletes the on-device medicine database and rebuilds it from bundled data.
clear_local_cache_confirm: This will delete the device's local medicine cache and rebuild it from the bundled seed data. Continue?
ai_prefs_use_gemini_desc: Get intelligent responses powered by Google Gemini AI.
ai_prefs_fallback_templates_desc: When AI is unavailable, show pre-written template answers.
ai_prefs_auto_summarise_desc: Automatically generate a plain-language summary after each scan.
privacy_data_usage: MediScan stores your scan history and saved medicines in Firebase. Your data is linked to your account and never shared with third parties.
privacy_delete_account_confirm: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
privacy_delete_all_data_confirm: This will delete all your scan history, saved medicines, and preferences. Are you sure?
no_saved_desc: Medicines you save from scan results will appear here.
remove_saved_confirm: Remove this medicine from your saved list?
about_desc: MediScan helps Pakistani users understand their medicines through AI-powered scanning and plain-language explanations.
about_disclaimer: MediScan provides information for educational purposes only. Always consult a qualified doctor or pharmacist before taking any medicine.
feedback_hint: Tell us what you think or report an issue...
share_app_message: I use MediScan to understand my medicines. Download it free: https://mediscan.app
checker_desc: Select your symptoms to find medicines that may help.
checker_no_results_desc: No medicines in our database match your selected symptoms.
checker_no_medicines_in_home: You have no saved medicines. Save medicines from scan results first, or switch to All Medicines mode.
